reviews.review_description:
You can see it included as in my Top 10 App Lab games video series here: https://youtu.be/0YXaguvpL9Y

Great casual puzzler with a welcome variety of puzzles to keep you entertained.

This is a joy to play. The physics is very well done and all the puzzles are fun and kept me wanting to try just one more. It's starts off with a tutorial and some simple block stacking puzzles, but gets quite challenging in later levels. The graphics are beautiful and the chilled reggae music fits perfectly. Highly recommended!
Great selection of puzzles. Only thing to make it better would be a mixed reality mode. Recommended.

Puzzle Tropicana brings back all of the nostalgia of old school board games and puzzles but in VR! If your a fan of all the little games you played in school as a child this game is for you!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iJcFAOoH2QA

Combines beautiful scenery and music with puzzles that seem simple at first but then get more challenging as you go. Highly recommend for a break from chaotic life and still keep the brain engaged. Very well done and I have to keep review short so I can go back and play a few more levels yet tonight! Good job!

reviews.review_title: Big fan of this one + 25% OFF
reviews.review_description:
25% OFF CODE (delete the space between “.com”)

https://www.oculus. com/appreferrals/PowPow55/5261915137162955/?utm_source=2

If you love puzzlers, you’ll love this one. Not a whole lot to be Sadi that others haven’t pointed out already. I will say I really love the bright colors. Ton of fun eye candy

This game is loaded with tons of different puzzles that actually get pretty difficult. You get a lot of bang for your buck with how many different challenges there are. Add in the atmospheric music and scenery and you get a truly unique and engaging experience.

This game is very charming. The graphics are simple and the environment is relaxing right up to the ambient music that is theme appropriate. Puzzles are simple at first and then slowly start to ramp in difficulty. Some a deceptively challenging and others are quick solves leading to the “just one more” mentality a game like this plays into. Amazing game. Thank you.

I play normally games which put my body in motion but this one puts my brain in motion and in the same time relaxes me. The physics are amazing, you really think you grab something and everything acts like in real life. At first I thought it's for kids but make no mistake, it will train a child's brain and it will challenge an adult one . Good job guys 😀
